titleStmt.title: SII 38.401: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 401. (A.R. No. 401 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, left of entrance, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year: Śaka 1401, Viḷambi, Mithuna śu. di. ·7, Monday Uttiraṭṭādi, Subhayōga and Gājakarṇa = 22nd June 1478 A.D. The tithi was ba. 7 and not śu. 7.

summary.p: Incomplete and badly damaged. Records the dedication of a number of maidservants (dēvaḍimai) to the Periyanāchchiyār shrine (in the) Tirumalaināyinār (temple) at Dēvakkāpuram, a tiruṉāmakkāṇi of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyār temple, a dēvasthānam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. These women were dedicated by Ettappanāyakkar for the merit of Īśura-nāyakkar and the same matter was engraved on the kumudappaḍai of the first tower in the Periyanāchchiyār temple.
Timmāyi, the daughter of Kaḷappāḷar, Veṉṟāl, the daughter of Veṅkaṭa, Mūttāḷ, the daughter of Koḻundan and several others were dedicated to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakāptam 1000 4 100 1ṉ melcellā niṉṟa viḷampi varuṣattu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapa[kṣa]ttu saptamiyum somavāramum Uttiraṭṭātiyum śubhayogamum gājakaraṇamum peṟṟa Inṟai nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalaThe letter la is engraved over the previous letter ḷ like � la
ttup palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu melkuṉṟa nāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu devasāṉamRead devastāṉamtirumalar vuṭaiyār tiruṉāmakkāṇiyāṉa devakkāpuram periyanācciyārkoyilil mutaṟkopuram kumutappaṭaiyil nāyakkar
Īcuranāyakkar taṉmamāka Ettappanāyakkar tirumalaināyinār periyanācciyārkoyilukku tevaṭimaiviṭuvikka muṉnāḷviṭṭa kaḷappāḷarmakaḷ timmāyi veṅkaṭa makaḷ veṉṟāḷ koḻuntaṉ maka
ḷ muttāḷ pallavarāyar makaḷ Ulakuṭaiyār mātiyār makaḷ māṇikkanācci meṟpaṭiyār makaḷ Āṉaicikaṅketi tirumalaiyār makaḷ piriyāḷ kollāviṭṭār makaḷ tiruveṅkaṭanācci vāṇṭār makaḷ māṇikkanācci nāvilaṅkā
tār makaḷ piḷḷaiyārnārnallār makaḷ me paḻaṅkoṇṭamār makaḷ Orupotar Uṇṇāmulaiyāḷ makaḷ tiruttakkar makaḷ tiruttakkār peraṉ Ammaiyappar makaḷ pakavāṉ nallāṉ makaḷ cellā E tavittaṉ makaḷ Aṇi mālaiyāḷ kulāva
vaḷḷi tāṉ makaḷ timmi tevaticca pakavaṉ makaḷ liṉāḷ Appanāyaṉār makaḷ kaccālai cetirāyar makaḷ perumāḷ Ammaiyappa nāyaṉār
tarāyar makaḷ vempanācci Aṅkarāyar makaḷ tirumalai nācci Ālaccūḻi perumāḷ makaḷ tevattāḷ Ati nā cevakamalai Untaṇṭaya � taṟaipuḻun ṇap pe cārayaḻu
rumāḷ makaḷ poṉṉāḷ cellapperumāḷ makaḷ A(ṇ)ṇāmalai nācci tirukkaivel makaḷ mallāḷ kāṭavataraiyar makaḷ poṉṉār perumāḷ makaḷ virā nārāyaṇappiccaṉ makaḷ tarmma vita Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 38.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
